name: Creality K1C CFS 0.4 nozzle
machine_start_gcode:
M140 S0
M104 S0

T{current_extruder}
RESPOND TYPE=command MSG="Loading Filament from CFS Slot "{current_extruder+1}
M204 S2000
G1 Z3 F600
M83
G1 Y150 F12000
G1 X0 F12000
G1 Z0.2 F600
G1 X0 Y150 F6000
G1 X0 Y0 E15 F6000
G1 X150 Y0 E15 F6000
G92 E0
G1 Z1 F600
